channel.title: Health
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Health, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 'Fear of Flying Clinic' helps anxious travelers back into the skies
item.description: For 50 years, a San Francisco-based group has created a space where fearful flyers can get supported exposure to air travel.

item.title: These Speedy Chicken Caesar Salad Wraps Pack 30+ Grams Of Protein
item.description: They'll quickly become a new lunchtime favorite.

item.title: Early Birds & Night Owls Don't Build Muscle the Same — Science Explains Why
item.description: Your body clock influences everything from protein synthesis to insulin sensitivity—here's how to optimize it.

item.title: The Type Of Olive Oil In Your Pantry Might Be Working Against You
item.description: You're favorite oil only has benefits if you're buying the right kind. Here's what you need to know.

item.title: BAFTAs apologize after guest with Tourette syndrome uses racial slur during ceremony
item.description: A man with Tourette syndrome shouted a racial slur and other offensive remarks during the BAFTA awards ceremony Sunday. The BBC did not edit out his o...

item.title: Influencers are promoting peptides for better health. What does the science say?
item.description: The latest wellness craze involves injecting these molecules for athletic performance, longevity and more. Scientists say the research isn't keeping p...

item.title: The FDA creates a quicker path for gene therapies
item.description: The Food and Drug Administration aims to evaluate treatments for rare diseases based on plausible evidence that they would work — without requiring a ...

item.title: 'Everything was in pieces:' Lindsey Vonn describes grueling surgery on broken leg
item.description: In a recent video, the Olympic skier credits her surgeon with saving her leg from potential amputation.

item.title: The Hidden Toxins In Your Cleaning Routine (& What To Use Instead)
item.description: Plus, what a clean home should really smell like.

item.title: This Underrated Habit Could Majorly Boost Liver & Metabolic Health
7 Nutrition Red Flags to Know About
item.description: Feeling unusually tired or noticing subtle changes in hair, nails, mood, or appetite? These signs may indicate nutrition gaps worth discussing with yo...

item.title: What Happens When Blood Sugar Falls Too Low
Tips for Making Exercise a Daily Habit
